claims.summary: Treat sluggishness as potentially structural, semantic, or relational and expose mobility, drag, permeability, and provenance without blaming cognition.
Verify receptivity and non-instrumental presence are represented as bounded readiness and evidence rather than predictive pressure.
Require Tier 5 approval for regulator micro-fluctuation, a new sensory buffer, plasticity rewards, or live containment-to-resonance changes.
